villagesreborn.biome_selector.title: 🏘️ Village Spawn Location
villagesreborn.biome_selector.descriptio: Choose your starting biome! You'll spawn 15-50 blocks from the nearest village, making it easy to find shelter and trade.
villagesreborn.world_creation.tab.title: Villages Reborn
villagesreborn.world_creation.tab.descri: Configure Villages Reborn settings for your world
villagesreborn.config.title: Villages Reborn Configuration
villagesreborn.config.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default values?
villagesreborn.config.ai.memory_limit.to: Maximum number of memories each villager can store
villagesreborn.config.ai.aggression.tool: Controls how aggressive villagers are in combat and interactions
villagesreborn.config.ai.advanced_ai.too: Enable advanced AI behaviors and decision making
villagesreborn.config.expansion.auto_exp: Allow villages to automatically expand over time
villagesreborn.config.expansion.max_vill: Maximum number of buildings a village can have
villagesreborn.config.governance.electio: Enable democratic elections for village leadership
villagesreborn.config.governance.assista: Allow villagers to have assistants and hierarchies
villagesreborn.config.features.dynamic_t: Enable dynamic pricing and trade relationships
villagesreborn.config.features.relations: Enable complex social relationships between villagers
villagesreborn.config.performance.adapti: Automatically adjust performance based on server load
villagesreborn.config.performance.tick_o: Optimize game tick processing for better performance
